zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet於1612年6月29日出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，他的父親Anthony Bowyer28歲，母親Mrs. Joyce Bowyer25歲。他於1634年5月29日與Margaret Weld在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1679年10月2日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾丹納姆享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾丹納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet于1612年6月29日出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，他的父亲Anthony Bowyer28岁，母亲Mrs. Joyce Bowyer25岁。他于1634年5月29日与Margaret Weld在英国英格兰倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1679年10月2日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾丹納姆享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾丹納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Baronet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Sal, Rocco, Vito, Carmela, Enrico, Giovanni, Pasquale, Domenic.
Italian: from an augmentative of the personal name Baro , or a nickname from the title barone ‘baron’ (see Baron 1).
Possibly also English or Scottish: archaic variant of   Baron  .

variants.name: Baro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Mario, Manuel, Ana, Angel, Carlos, Cesar, Fernando, Jesus, Jose, Orlando, Ramon, Rosalia.  Italian Guido, Angelo, Carmelo, Federico, Lucio.
Catalan (Baró): status name from baró ‘free man, baron’ (see Baron 1), or a habitational name from a place so named.
Hungarian (Báró): status name from báró ‘baron’. In the form Baró, it could be from a pet form of the personal names Barabás (see Barabas ) or Bertalan.

variants.name: Baroni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Gino, Giorgio, Aldo, Carlo, Domenica, Ettore, Fabiano, Matteo, Remo, Ricco, Ugo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Barone  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Bowyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

variants.name: Bowman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for an archer, hunter or soldier armed with a bow, from Middle English bow(e)man, bouman (from Old English boga ‘bow’ + mann ‘man’). This word was distinguished from Bowyer , which denoted a maker or seller of bows.
Americanized form of German   Baumann   or the Dutch cognate   Bouwman  .

variants.name: Bouyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Frederique, Monique, Napoleon.
French (southern): regional variant of   Bouvier  . Compare   Beyea  .

variants.name: Boyers
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: 1st
meanings: Cornish: A Cornish form of Just (Prouter Est, the priest of St. Just).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet was born on 29 June 1612, in London, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anthony Bowyer, was 28 and his mother, Mrs. Joyce Bowyer, was 25. He married Margaret Weld on 29 May 1634, in St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 October 1679, in Denham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Denham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet est né le 29 juin 1612, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anthony Bowyer, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Joyce Bowyer, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Weld le 29 mai 1634, à St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1679, à Denham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Denham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Oktober 1679 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Denham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Denham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet è nato il il 29 giugno 1612 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Anthony Bowyer, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Joyce Bowyer, aveva 25 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronetが1612年6月29日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Anthony Bowyerは28歳，母Mrs. Joyce Bowyerは25歳であった。1634年5月29日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト オラブ オルド ジュリー ウィス スト マルティン ポメロイでMargaret Weldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1679年10月2日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアデンハムで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアデンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet(이)가 1612년 6월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthony Bowyer(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Joyce Bowyer(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1634년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이에서 Margaret Weld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1679년 10월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 데함에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 데함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet nasceu em 29 de junho de 1612, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anthony Bowyer, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Joyce Bowyer, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Weld em 29 de maio de 1634, em St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1679, em Denham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Denham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bowyer 1st Baronet родился 29 июня 1612 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anthony Bowyer было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Joyce Bowyer, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Weld 29 мая 1634 г. в местности ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 октября 1679 г. в местности денам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности денам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Weld el 29 de mayo de 1634, en St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
